overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person walk through Night City. The clip begins on an elevated neon-lit walkway overlooking the skyline, then cuts to a ground-level exploration of a narrow, wet back alley in a residential district with massive illuminated megastructures visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon railings overlooking city skyline

events.description: hard cut to black screen transitioning to ground level scene

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway, observing the neon-lit city skyline and palm trees

entered.detail: large red arched bridge structure spanning across the view
continuous blue neon light strip along the walkway railing
tall palm tree with green fronds visible against the night sky
three massive illuminated skyscrapers with colorful vertical lighting in the far distance
tall pole with multiple bright white lights illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway at night, lined with blue neon railings and palm trees. The camera moves forward along the path, with a large red bridge arch visible ahead and the illuminated mega-towers of the city skyline glowing in the background. The area is completely deserted with no pedestrians or vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban back alley with utility poles and corrugated metal shacks

events.description: scene cuts to ground level in narrow residential alley with wet asphalt and trash
camera turns right to view large circular holographic billboard before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow wet alley, navigating past trash bags and utility poles while heading toward distant neon-lit towers

entered.detail: small dilapidated wooden houses with corrugated metal roofs lining the alley
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires crisscrossing overhead
piles of garbage bags and scattered debris along the right side of the alley
metal chain link fencing running along the left side of the path
large circular floating holographic advertisement with rotating imagery

segments.scene_description: Following a hard cut, the scene shifts to a ground-level narrow alley in a residential district. The camera walks forward on wet asphalt reflecting the neon lights, passing wooden shacks, utility poles, and trash bags. Large holographic billboards float above, and the three mega-towers remain visible in the distance, now appearing closer and more prominent as the camera advances through the enclosed corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a sterile, elevated vantage point overlooking the skyline into the claustrophobic depths of a residential alley. It begins on a deserted concrete walkway lined with blue neon railings and palm trees, moving forward toward a large red bridge arch beneath the glow of distant mega-towers. The perspective then shifts abruptly to ground level, where the open vista is replaced by a narrow corridor of wet asphalt reflecting vibrant neon lights. As the camera advances, it passes wooden shacks, utility poles, and trash bags under floating holographic billboards, while the three distant mega-towers loom larger and more prominent against the enclosed urban environment.
